dimensions.name: Dependency Order
dimensions.level_1: Steps are out of order; migration after model use, or tests before implementation.
dimensions.level_3: Order mostly correct but one or two steps could be parallelized or need swapping.
dimensions.level_5: Steps are in strict topological order. Every step's dependencies are satisfied by prior steps.

dimensions.name: Step Atomicity
dimensions.level_1: Steps are vague or bundle multiple files/concerns into one step.
dimensions.level_3: Steps are mostly atomic but one or two bundle multiple concerns.
dimensions.level_5: Each step touches exactly one file or one logical change. No bundling.

dimensions.name: Delta Specificity
dimensions.level_1: Steps describe end state only, no delta. 'Create X' without what exists now.
dimensions.level_3: Delta described for most steps but one or two miss the current state.
dimensions.level_5: Every step explicitly states: what exists now, what is missing per spec, what must not change.

dimensions.name: Runtime Gate Quality
dimensions.level_1: No final runtime verification. Plan ends with code step.
dimensions.level_3: Final verification exists but is vague ('run tests') or missing observable signal.
dimensions.level_5: Two-tier gate: focused verification of new contract + separate regression gate with explicit commands and pass/fail signals.

dimensions.name: Test Materialization
dimensions.level_1: No test step or tests are implied but not listed.
dimensions.level_3: Test step exists but without explicit AC mapping or test DB prerequisite.
dimensions.level_5: Test step maps each AC to test cases; prerequisite (test DB) materialized; command explicit.
